series_metadata.series_title: Field Training Guides and Rating Sheets
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records related to field training for new employees during their probationary periods. Records include training guides, minimum acceptable levels of performance for standard operating procedures, and evaluations. (if applicable)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven (7) years from completion of FTO period. Record may be imaged: if imaged, paper may be destroyed when electronic record is validated. May be transferred DPS Record Center during retention period. ; Electronic: seven (7) years from date of completion of FTO period. Electronic record is retained on applicable network server
